auth.label: API Key
auth.description: TwitterAPI.io API key used with the X-API-Key request header. Create or copy it from your TwitterAPI.io dashboard: https://twitterapi.io/dashboard.

actions.name: add_monitored_tweet_user
actions.description: Add an X user to real-time Tweet monitoring.

xUserName.description: The X screen name without the @ prefix.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding an X user to real-time Tweet monitoring.

message.description: The upstream status or error message.

msg.description: The upstream status or error message.

outputSchema.description: twitterapi.io response for a mutation request.

actions.name: add_tweet_filter_rule
actions.description: Add a Webhook/WebSocket tweet filter rule.

tag.description: A custom tag that identifies the tweet filter rule.

value.description: The Twitter search rule used to filter Tweets.

intervalSeconds.description: The interval, in seconds, used to check matching Tweets.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding a Webhook/WebSocket tweet filter rule.

rule_id.description: The ID of the added tweet filter rule.

message.description: The upstream status or error message.

msg.description: The upstream status or error message.

outputSchema.description: twitterapi.io response for adding a Webhook/WebSocket tweet filter rule.

actions.name: advanced_search_tweets
actions.description: Run an advanced Twitter search query.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor. Use an empty string or omit it for the first page.

inputSchema.description: Input for advanced Tweet search.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Tweet.

url.description: The x.com URL of the Tweet.

text.description: The text content of the Tweet.

source.description: The client or source that posted the Tweet.

lang.description: The language code of the Tweet.

isReply.description: Whether the Tweet is a reply.

inReplyToId.description: The Tweet ID being replied to.

inReplyToUserId.description: The user ID being replied to.

inReplyToUsername.description: The screen name being replied to.

entities.description: Additional upstream fields returned by twitterapi.io.

anyOf.description: Additional upstream fields returned by twitterapi.io.
Additional upstream fields returned by twitterapi.io.

tweets.description: The Tweets returned by the endpoint.

next_cursor.description: The cursor to pass to the next request.

message.description: The upstream status or error message.

msg.description: The upstream status or error message.

outputSchema.description: twitterapi.io response containing Tweet objects and pagination metadata.

intervalSeconds.description: The interval, in seconds, used to check matching Tweets.

isEffect.description: Whether the rule is effective. Use 1 for effective and 0 for inactive.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a Webhook/WebSocket tweet filter rule.

message.description: The upstream status or error message.

msg.description: The upstream status or error message.

outputSchema.description: twitterapi.io response for a mutation request.
